rewards.RewardPageTitle: Complimentary 7 Night Cruise to the Mexican Riviera

rewards.RewardDescription: Enjoy a complimentary cruise from Whittier, AK and Vancouver, CA to Alaska on Norwegian Jade! Sail from now through September 14, 2026.
ArushaNotes: Arusha manually added this reward retrospectively
This reward is appears pretty often and I think it only expired on 14 Sep because that's when the summer season ends. I predict it will pop up again for use in Summer 2027.

rewards.RewardPageTitle: $1,000 Holiday Dollars Off Your Next Cruise
rewards.RewardDescription: Give yourself the ultimate holiday treat — set sail with Norwegian Cruise Line and enjoy $1,000 off your dream vacation.
rewards.PointHistoryNote: I purchased this deal on 22 Nov 2025 for 500k points, but on Black Friday (28 Nov) it dropped to 250k points.
